title: Photography Journal | Tips & Locations From Lisa
description: First-hand planning advice from a Tri-Cities photographer — when to book, where to go, what to wear, and how to get photographs worth keeping forever.

hero.heading: The Journal
hero.intro: Twenty years of Tri-Cities sessions have taught me a few things — when to book, where the light falls, what to wear, and how to make the whole thing feel easy. I write it all down here, so you can plan like an insider.

items.heading: 12 Best Places to Take Pictures in the Tri-Cities, WA
items.detail: Where the light falls in Richland, Kennewick and Pasco, from a photographer who's chased it for twenty years.

links.label: 12 Best Places to Take Pictures in the Tri-Cities, WA

items.heading: When to Take Senior Pictures: A Tri-Cities Timeline
items.detail: The honest answer to "is it too late?", plus the booking calendar nobody tells you about.

links.label: When to Take Senior Pictures: A Tri-Cities Timeline

items.heading: In-Home vs. Studio Newborn Photography
items.detail: An honest comparison to help you choose what's right for your family's first days.

items.heading: Branding Photos vs. Headshots: What Your Business Actually Needs
items.detail: The difference, the overlap, and how to decide where to start.

finalCta.heading: Start With Your Session
paragraphs: Reading is planning — but the light won't wait forever.
